title: StationInfo
description: Station information broadcast via BLE characteristic FFF1 (Read). Contains static and semi-static metadata about the self-service station.

stationModel.description: Model identifier of the station hardware

firmwareVersion.description: Semantic version of the station firmware

bayCount.description: Number of service bays available at this station

bleProtocolVersion.description: Semantic version of the BLE protocol supported by the station

connectivity.description: Current network connectivity status of the station
